name: fine-tune-slm
description: Installer for the fine-tune-slm Agent Skills: fine-tune a small language model locally on Apple Silicon (MLX + LoRA) via a plain-English interview, plus a companion skill to publish tested models. Copies the skills into your AI coding agent's skills directory (Claude Code validated; Codex/Cursor experimental; Antigravity manual).
author: Prashant Nigam (https://github.com/prashantnigam10)
